Building is very old but nicely maintained Bed quality was excellent and quality of toilettes are very good We booked family suite and there are three single beds in children room but we have a teenage daughter so they gave us two connecting rooms later which were much better The rooms are facing back of building which is better than facing road because it is more quiet and you can keep window open

The only let down was the service On check in our luggage was lost and we had to go identity it Then we were then short a bathrobe that never came Same thing happened with our request for an iron We enjoyed our stay but for the price service should be on point   Beautiful hotel in a great location We booked the Eiffel tower junior suite which was lovely with a great view The bed nice and big but very hard I know some prefer hard to soft Good and friendly staff on reception

they should not lie about their prices and accommodation to lure people in it although they said was booking com that misrepresented the value I could have been in a better place And wouldn t feel annoyed and fooled by people I gave my business to  THE CITY

This is my favorite hotel I have stayed here three times and never been disappointed It is located right next to the Louvre and the Tuileries Gardens near a stop on metro line 1 and within easy walking distance of the Paris Opera and the Musee d Orsay The hotel is in an original Haussmann building with decorations in Art Nouveau style An old world Parisian style pervades the building and the excellent service but a recent remodeling has made the rooms and the bathrooms state of the art Many of the rooms have Eiffel Tower views we were lucky enough to be upgraded to the Eiffel Tower suite with a table on a small balcony where we could have breakfast overlooking the Eiffel Tower the Louvre and many of the top Paris monuments Hotels in Paris can be expensive and this one is but we left with a feeling of money well spent
I expected a little bit more for the money The room was quite small   The bed was extremely comfortable and the view was unparalleled Staff very attentive Classy hotel
It s a great hotel Beautiful and the staff is awesome I lost my earrings and they did find them and kept them safe until I came back for them after one week

The room was wonderful but the curtained in shower area was cramped   Perfect for those looking for the ultimate Paris experience The location decor and architectural design cannot be beat If you are looking for the hotel gym and buffet breakfast this is not it Wonderful staff Ask for a view of the park

The shower wasn t my favorite It didn t have any glass doors it was just a tiled space in the corner of the bathroom with a wrap around shower curtain No matter how careful we always managed to get water everywhere making the floor a mess and slippery Our room also had an unpleasant odor to it not sure if its just because the hotel is a very old building or it there had been previous guests that smoked   We were lucky to have one of the few rooms with a view of the Eiffel Tower which was wonderful I liked that the windows were double paned and we could open them up for some fresh air and an even better view of the Eiffel Tower The location of this hotel centrally located for any traveler who is wanting to see the main and best highlights of Paris It s right next to the Louvre Museum and the Jardin des Tuileries and other prominent museums The bus and metro lines are very close with quick access to the other sites to see The concierge was helpful the night before we left to get us an early taxi to the airport The bar and terrace looked beautiful but we did not visit them

The air conditioning is not like what we have in the States and most nights we had trouble sleeping due to bing too hot in our expensive room That was disappointing Our view was unbelievable It was more than I had hoped for with three different balconies facing the Eiffel Tower   The staff was fantastic friendly and very helpful The property is absolutely beautiful

Toilet requires a deep clean Black stain in bottom of the bowl and red mould around rim under toilet seat Unacceptable visual impact for a guest Tariff would suggest that this should have been addressed via regular periods of maintenance Room service wine glasses were clouded from frequent washing However glasses in room mini bar were clean and not cloudy   View

The view from my room looked into other rooms So we closed our curtains all times By cutting off nature lights and view of distance objects we felt boxed in For a honeymoon room they could have tried better for a better facing room   Closest hotel to lourve museum and gardens

I was a bit nervous traveling by myself not knowing much French From the few days before when I needed to arrange taxi service from the airport to when I arrived hours before checkin and the accommodations they made for me to the delicious room service albeit a bit expensive EXCELLENT The room itself was beautiful the bed extremely comfortable the bathroom well lit and very clean Every staff member I interacted with was SO KIND SO POLITE The location of the hotel is right in the heart of Paris across the street from the Louvre and walking distance to all the major Paris attractions I will definitely be back

On our first evening which was a Sunday and coincided with the election of the new French President who was about to party at the Louvre right in front of our hotel we decided to have a quiet dinner in our lovely suite as most local restaurants appeared to be closed Despite specifying clearly to Room Service on the phone that we wanted parmesan cheese with our pesto pasta and some bread to accompany the other fish dish which should in any case be normal practice it arrived without both The waiter had to go back and get them which meant that in the meantime our meal became rather cold which spoiled it somewhat The quality of the food was good however Some of the restaurant bar staff need to be better trained We had lunch one hot day in the nearly empty bar and it took them around 15 minutes just to bring us an iced tea while the bar girls appeared to be just chatting amongst themselves in the meantime   Wonderful location near all the interesting sites especially the Louvre Lovely view from Eifel Tower junior suite Room and bathroom beautiful newly furnished and with all mod cons but in the old style Bed very comfortable Hotel kindly gave us a bottle of champagne to enjoy and delicious chocolates on the pillow at night a good old fashioned 5 star hotel as it should be Breakfast very good only had it once in the hotel but they forgot to charge us for it and when we pointed it out to Reception they waived it which I thought was very professional and much appreciated Great hotel on the whole

The upholstered lobby furniture chairs and sofas should be replaced   The Hotel Regina was in the perfect location to get to all the important sites in Paris The hotel staff was friendly and helpful The old world charm of this historic hotel was just what we wanted Our family room was perfect for us with our 2 children It had lots of room especially for a hotel in Paris and having the 2 fully fitted bathrooms was great Our room faced the Louvre but we had a view of the Eiffel Tower from our small balcony There was no noise from the street below thanks to the double windows The cleaning staff was excellent and our girls loved the turn down service at night The food at the restaurant was good and the bar stayed open late one evening so I could work

We booked a Junior suite and the size of the bedroom was very small It wasn t the same suite as shown on booking com at all We also requested a king size bed and we had two twin beds pushed together which then separated when we slept on it so my partner and I had to sleep on the twin beds with a gap between us Due to falling down the gap it hurt my lower back We made a complaint on checking out and we are still waiting for the manager to come back to us  The view of the Eiffel Tower was amazing from the 6th floor The room had 3 small balconies
Price of breakfast was outrageously high particularly if you are not a big eater   Lovely suite in a fabulous location Very comfortable Concierge service was wonderful

I couldn t find fault with anything Perhaps if I m being really pedantic the power from the shower could be a bit better   Everything start to finish was a 5 experience Allowing for my poor French the staff were delighted at my attempt to converse Completely unlike any other experience I ve had in Paris previously

Absolutely nothing   It was simply amazing The room was breathtaking the quality of service superior the view dazzling the location perfect Across the street in one direction the Louvre in the other was the best pastry shop in Paris
Can t think of anything  Everything was great But the best part of my stay was the staff they treated you as part of the family Which has made my time at the Regina very memorable

The breakfast prices were pretty steep we walked outside for breakfast   Fabulous location and accommodations very luxurious The staff was very attentive The dining room was fantastic for dinner Next time we will upgrade for an outside view of Paris

Our stay wasn t long enough   An exceptional boutique hotel with beautiful period features transporting one back in time Centrally located to major tourist attractions metro boutique shopping this hotel offers the discerning traveler the complete package The rooms are large which is unusual for Paris the beds and pillows are luxurious ensuring a complete rest and the staff from the doorman to the management are friendly informative and helpful No request was too big or small from booking tickets to a local football match to booking a cooking class with a traditional French chef they can handle any request with ease Staffs local knowledge was extremely helpful assisting us to have the best experience possible This is one hotel you should not pass up if you are looking to book a total Parisian experience

Nothing negative I can offer except for a rather cold Spring week on our visit   The friendly service particularly at the Concierge Reception No matter too big or small to deal with Luxury at a different level Cleanliness comfort of the bedroom Best laundry service ever encountered Location no need for a taxi within a 15 minute walk or 5 km radius it s that central The Louvre and Musee l Orangerie are your neighbours My new home away from home in Paris
The lobby of the hotel is very small and the hotel corridors is little old fashion You might feel that you are in 1960s   The hotel location The room is clean and the the staff are friendly

The veiw was of other rooms we were on the inside courtyard But right outside was the beautiful Jardin deTuiliers and a veiw of the Eiffel Tower and the Louve We didn t spend enough time in our room to really care that there wasn t a great view   The room was beautiful The staff very friendly Very quiet and fantastic location
Staff was extremely pleasant and very helpful Accommodated all of our needs Our room had a view of the Eiffel Tower and the gardens across the avenue

Shower could be a little bigger  Breakfast in the room Excellent and very friendly front of house overall a memorable experience From the Doorman Gildas who is fantastic to the housekeeping and room service staff Nothing like a happy staff complement This shows great leadership and that contributes to the ambience

The fact we had to leave our hotel and Paris   Our room was magnificent a perfect view of the Eiffel Tower Paris Eye and of course all the beauty of Paris The staff were far exceeding even our expectations of a first class hotel They went out of their way to make us feel at home advising us to be sure to try the bar across from the hotel entrance on the corner And their restaurant is filled with staff that is at once unobtrusive yet attentive The service and food must be experienced to understand that without a doubt not a dinner but an epicurean delight of ambience and great food Across the street on the corner is a wonderful Bar Bistro that has scrumptious salads and main dishes that were less expensive than I would have expected for the quantity and quality of the food A must do when staying at the hotel Another tip grab the two day hop on hop off bus pass for around 40 euros and explore all of Paris The pass is far cheaper than trying to get a taxi in some areas My wife loved the shopping so guys wear comfy walking shoes and enjoy the people of Paris

Thier old dirty furniture and worst of all their MATTRESSES My spouse and agree it was the worst mattress we have ever slept on we couldn t get a good goodnight sleep the whole time we were there we constantly kept waking up during the night and barely slept when we first hoped into bed   Location and their friendly staff

Service excellent and impeccable Staff ALL attentive and extremely polite and helpful Hotel perfectly clean and comfortable Temperature easily regulated bed super comfortable with variety of pillows to choose from Always clean and crisp bed linen and towels Marvellous view of Tuileries and Eiffel Tower a dream to treasure All receptionists concierges and doormen extremely nice and helpful We were welcomed by manager and recognised from having been at the hotel before Addressed by name so very personalised treatment Ideal location central to all attractions and neighbourhoods Didn t use metro at all but had lovely walks all over Paris Then back to a super comfortable super clean room Can t wait to be back at the Regina Pyramides
This hotel is perfect nothing that can be done better   The entire hotel is heaven The bed is a dream come true The rooms are amazing the staff is incredibly kind

A very beautiful and charming Hotel Staff are excellent always attentive to client needs and a pleasure to speak with Location is superb a short and enjoyable walk from major attractions otherwise metro taxi and bus service are easily accessible Restaurant and Bar offer both a wonderful service and delicious menu Already planning a return trip thank you for the perfect stay

Room a little cold due to larger than average size Paris room Highest air con is 25 degree The hand hold Shower head pointing at a direction that s slightly awakard when you switch on it spray water on the floor   Concierge staff were very friendly and helpful

Nothing  Great location with views to die for stayed here before a few years ago and compared to that trip they ve really spruced up the place Amazingly comfortable bed hotel also threw in a free bottle of champagne

Location is prefect very nice and professional staff no noise at all But only you have to ask the room service every day for the water and towels other than this was an excellent hotel for me Room 640

Instant coffee in the room really Yuck Mini bar inferior brands at silly prices Room service menu crazy prices So what does a guest do in response We never ate in the hotel The lovely English bar was a dead zone No bar food In need of new innovative ideas to breath life into the hotel again   Best location right opposite the Tuileries garden Louvre and directly next to the Outlet Mall bus stop A grand hotel from the old glory days Corner rooms have stunning views of the Eiffel Tower across the gardens
We didn t have bouth of rooms with view which I was asked for it  Everything was perfect bed was really comfortable Breakfast was good and all the staffs were friendly and helpful

The hotel restaurant is okay but not up to the quality of the rest of the hotel   This is a gorgeous hotel directly across the street from the Louvre and within walking distance of most attractions The building is classic elegance with high ceilings ornate woodwork yet it has been updated with all the conveniences you d want It is very quiet even rooms looking out over a busy street are very quiet This is definitely where I ll stay when I return to Paris

Nothing it was literally perfect   I was taking my girlfriend on a surprise trip to Paris prior to deploying with the Army for 6 months I booked a normal room that stated it had a view of the Louvre I explained it was a special occasion during the booking and asked that if possible we could get a good view of the Louvre When we arrived we were greeted by the hotel staff and I was waiting for what I assumed would be the room I booked however we were informed that after seeing my request they had upgraded us which I thought was really lovely Little did I know that they had actually upgraded us to the Eiffel Tower Suite It was incredible and the room was laid out with petals etc on the bed and in the bathroom It had the most amazing view of the Eiffel Tower I could not praise this hotel and the staff enough It was absolutely fantastic in every way and I absolutely recommend anybody staying here My best hotel experience hands down

We had emailed the hotel of our late arrival so they knew we were travelling from the USA on a flight that was delayed for almost 7 hours We were so were parched and when we got to our room we saw there was no water left out for us so we took one from the mini bar When we checked out I saw that they charged me 9 Euros for the water So excessive ridiculous really for a small bottle of water The next two nights they left bottled water for us on the nightstand   My daughter and I stayed for 3 nights and had a lovely stay in Paris The location was excellent directly across from the Louvre The front desk staff were helpful The beds were comfy and the room was well appointed Very nice bathroom with large walk in shower
Breakfast really needs improvement It was not a 5 start hotel breakfast at all Room carpets need to change   Location is perfect Beds are really comfortable Staff were amazing

A very noisy flag pole above our room kept us awake No mirror in the room Terrible bar staff and wine selection They ran out of tonic as it was Paris Fashion week And we couldn t order wine as the sommelier was off and he had the key   Lovely room Eiffel Suite Nice reception staff

This is minor but I wish the bedding and curtains in the room weren t boring beige and dark brown other colors would have reflect the grandness of the hotel better   Amazing location Walked everywhere from the Louvre to Pont des Invalides to the stores on Saint Honore Great and friendly staff especially the lovely Helen and Beligh

Nothing  Our stay at the Hotel regina was excellent in every way The hotel is beautifully renovated modern amenities but with traditional charm My bedroom was a good size not particularly big but roomy by Parisian standards with a magnificent view There was complimentary instant coffee and a coffee pot so I could fix myself a cup of coffee before starting the day The bed was very comfortable and the room extremely clean The bathroom was a very good size with soft big towels not commonly to find in french hotels and a good sized shower The staff was extremely courteous and accommodating The hotel s location is perfect within walking distance of many famous sites and great neighborhoods and very close to metro stops And all this came with the most reasonably priced rate I have ever seen I would have expected this experience to cost deservedly so at least three times what my room cost I can t rate this hotel highly enough I would go back there in a heartbeat A beautiful hotel in a fantastic location with superior staff

I went to Paris on a special occasion and let the staff know so they could help me prepare a surprise for my fianc e I must say the staff was 5 stars very friendly and always ready to help They made the whole experience better than I could have imagined it We travel a lot and always stay at 4 or 5 stars Hotels and I can say this was one of the best Hotels we stayed on Will definitely stay there again on my next trip to Paris

This is a magnificent grande dame hotel situated right in the heart of the opera district directly across from the Louvre I am a Canadian and stayed in this hotel for eight nights during the Christmas season I don t speak fluent french but the staff were extremely accommodating with the English speaking guests everyone from front desk housekeeping to the concierge as well as the lounge and restaurant They are also all very accommodating and friendly The rooms are spacious and well kept very elegant and clean Every few days I would have a full bowl of fruit and chocolates left in my room clean fluffy robes and slippers a towel warmer in the bathroom and windows that open for fresh air and a beautiful view The concierge was extremely helpful in helping with tours directions Prices are surprisingly comparable to many other hotels that are more run down I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone wanting to stay in the heart of Paris in the lap of luxury I will definitely be booking this hotel again as I love the city of light

Restaurant was great service but food not too impressive But there is so much choice around that is not a worry It wasn t bad just not amazing   Beautiful hotel 5 star quality all the way through Everyone is very friendly and the attention to detail is spot on We had a view of the Eiffel Tower and was a great room In fact the family room was two connecting rooms which is great as the kids think they have a room of their own and bathroom but they are under easy watch still Concierge and doorman are so ready to help you on anything Location is 150m from the tuileries metro station That is good because you are sort of in the middle of all the main places to see Louvre is literally round the corner You cannot be better placed Rooms are spotless and wifi works impeccably Just have to do a relog in every 24 hours Expensive but it is 5 star and you get what you pay for Well recommended to anyone who wants to enjoy Paris in style

We selected to stay at the Regina for our last four nights after a month stay in France We had high expectations since this is a 5 star hotel but sadly we were extremely disappointed It was a really sad end to an otherwise amazing time in Paris and France When we arrived the room was nice but in a very poor location There was no view and the noise level from the hotel staff was outrageous On one day we counted ten times hotel staff slammed doors outside our room There was constant noise from the hallway from staff and from outside our room with things clanging crashing We might have been near the hotel bar or restaurant It was not acceptable There was no hot water in the shower in our room when we arrived We called the front desk twice to get someone to look at it The night manager checked it and confirmed it was broken We were offered a smaller room on a lower floor in a less desirable location for the same price no less or wait until morning to have it fixed We thought the offer was pretty ridiculous so we opted to have it repaired in the morning We were told someone would arrive between 8am 9am to fix it No one showed up so at 9 30 we called and someone finally showed up at about 10 15 He got it to work but only minimally so We were not offered another room or any discount on our room The water was lukewarm at best with NO water pressure whatsoever The staff were polite but very slow to respond We had to call four times to get towels and when they arrived at our room they did STILL did not have what we requested They constantly entered our room even when the light outside our room was red indicating we wanted privacy and did not want our room serviced When the green light indicating service was wanted no one showed up We had to call to request service We called to complain about the noise and the fact that the shower was still not functioning properly   Location of the hotel Strong WiFi Beautiful hotel

Full_Review: Our first room carpet was wet so they moved us Bed in second room was really hard   It s really handy for the station and easy checking in Staff friendly We have stayed several times

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The chemical cheap perfume at the entrance made it very very hard to stay in this hotel For this reason we won t go again in this hotel   The friendliness of the staff

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The room was a little small but for one night didn t matter  Ideally placed for an early train the room was clean and functional for one night There are plenty of bars cafes and restaurants within walking distance

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Property is attached to the Gare De Lyon station which made it really easy for us since we were coming late night to Paris on TGV Moving around in the city was also very easy due to access to all the underground lines from Gare De Lyon Staff was very helpful and genuine

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: For a 4 star hotel considering the price the room was small When I put the towels on the floor they were not all replaced The shower faucet was broken and leaking water everywhere The room service was terrible half of the dishes on the menu were not available and the food was not very good   The location is right at one of the main stations They stored my luggage for free the day of departure

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Put the price down to 70euros which is the true value of the bed and breakfast experience I am an ex hotelier having worked in 4 5 star hotels for many years  Breakfast was appalling hotel is not a 4 but a 3 star deluxe Service at breakfast was terrible They put a lady at the door that greeted you like a police officer but could not even get the staff to bring a simple bottle of water when asked Food was the worst eaten chef must read this Sausage and bacon were swimming in fat egg looked like it had been mixed with porridge and mustard Earl Grey tea had finished and to ruin everything the hot water kettle poured cold water A disaster

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: We had a check in time of 3 pm we checked in at 10 am and left our bags in til 3 pm traveled back at 6pm and the room was still not ready we Didn t get our room till 7 15 pm we were given a free drink for waiting and I stayed there as I am a Acor member not good enough

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Felt it was over priced for the room Booked a Privilege Room but it was not very big Pictures showed a room a lot bigger Just be aware that you can hear the announcements from the station next door didn t bother us though   This hotel was next to the train station so very convenient Some very good restaurants near by The staff where very friendly and helpful Good for a couple of nights stay

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: At Breakfast took 20 minutes to refill Bacon and Sausages This was the only negative part of the stay   Got upgrade at check in by very helpful staff member

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Had to swipe credit card to use safe   Great location if travelling by train Nice restaurants directly underneath hotel great set menus for dinner and breakfast

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The area around the station has restaurants and bars and we had a decent meal at one of these opposite the station It is a very busy and noisy area but you would probably expect that Did not feel unsafe walking around   Right next to train station so very handy for travel Asked for a low floor and got first level which I was pleased with as this does not often happen Staff on reception friendly and multi lingual Room was adequate but not large and it was clean Did not take breakfast as I thought it was a bit expensive I would stay here again

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Room a little cramped Signs of mould in the ceiling outside the bathroom   The location and facilities were great Staff for the most part very courteous and helpful Really good breakfast options

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The room wasn t what I expected for 100 a night and it didn t include breakfast which was also expensive   The train station was really handy next door Got to all of Paris within 20 minutes

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Bathroom too small and so water had no where to go when running over bath when showering So cabinetry also got wet this will perish in time Need extra bath mats liquid soap dispenser need 2 hands to push some out so no way to catch any that s just silly and thus a waste of liquid soap Lucky you had soap Bathroom could be a little bigger so door doesn t come so close to toilet but it would do A bit cheap providing pencil not a pen pencils always break and too light when it writing a note No hot water in breakfast room so could not make tea my daughter used coffee machine but had coffee in water still Waited for hit water to be filled but didn t occur for whole of our breakfast   Next to train station and not even 1 minute walk to Metro which was terrific for us but not noisy to hear in hotel Considerate staff and helpful with different matters and friendly with good sense of humour especially with my poor French wasn t a problem at all and staff English was good Reception staff and help with moving our luggage assistant were very good to deal with When we had unused leftover Metro tickets we were happy to give to helpful staff as they were helpful with us Even with misunderstanding with the room was solved so easily and quickly not a problem Random complimentary sweet jars in foyer were nice touch Room comfy Appreciate the water complimentary in room Breakfast was quite good nice wide selection of choices Bed was comfy and room quiet appreciated the curtains were heavy and kept room dark

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The room was small and the condition was average e g The carpet in the room and in the hallway was worn Most unsatisfactory was that the air conditioning only worked when turned to 5 degrees which it didn t actually get anywhere near and only with the fan speed going full blast all night The result was a warm and noisy and not very restful night   The lobby was a comfortable place to sit while waiting for our train

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: We had to wait for breakfast places to be set one morning The air conditioning wasn t very efficient Other staff weren t as friendly   It was a good location for the purpose of our trip Reception staff were helpful and friendly Complimentary mini bar

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Lady on reception very rude Room tiny 9x12 acc didn t work Horrible room Cleaner kept coming in on second day checking we left even tho check in was 12 Woke us up 3 times she came in   Next to train station

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: There was nothing not to like   This is a big corporate hotel so can only be described as good not special I enjoyed my stay and would go again without hesitation if required but you do not get and neither do you expect the personal touch

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: No tea bags only herbal tea bags Basic drink facilities e g 1 sachet milk each per day no china cups only paper hotel deducted 50 per night per person additionally from a credit card and authorised it in the card even though they did not apply why is this their policy   Location right next to the station nice area safe

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Even though the room was prepaid the staff asked for my credit card Fair enough as most hotels do this to guarantee payment for extras However Mecure took 100 euros from my account They said it was a preauthorisation and no money would be taken but it was Not sure when the money will be refunded but very disappointed as it was part of my holiday money and leaves me short Also be aware that you will pay bank commission charges Won t use the hotel again ever   Good location beds were comfortable

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Insulting procedure blocking 100 extra on my card This hasn t happened when staying at Mercure Gare de Lyon in Paris Presented as our practice by receptionist as if I was a criminal There was NO indication this would happen when I made my booking I was delayed leaving for an early train as the night Porter struggled to remove it yet not allowed to have this done the evening before when it was quite obvious I would not be having breakfast   Coffee making fridge in room

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Had to ask at reception for city map tourist information as couldn t see any leaflets Staff didn t appear very knowledgeable about some of the local attractions opening hours etc but did look them up on the computer for us   This was a 2 night stay en route to Italy Property was in a good location close to the railway station for our onward trip Staff were pleasant Didn t take the breakfast option so can t comment Able to walk to some attractions locally Good selection of cafes restaurants supermarket in locality

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Buffet breakfast good but not replenished on a timely basis when busy The bathroom more correctly shower toilet was tiny   A great location if arriving departing by train from Gare du Lyon but require immediate access to RER metro buses

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The hotel was next door to Gard de Lyon where we were catching the fast train to Barcelona the next day Would stay there again and also the breakfast was very good

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Hotel staff The hotel advertises that has luggage storage facilities When I ask the reception the lady she refused to keep my suitcase she said that they were expecting a large group the following day and they needed the storage and that the group takes preference to individuals staying at the hotel When the next shift come in I ask again for reception to keep my suitcase on storage and there was no problems the gentleman on duty kindly accepted my suitcase Some hotel staff does understand hospitality but others dont   The hotel location is perfect next to transport and beautiful sights

Full_Review: added in paragraph above  The staff were very friendly and helpful The corridors and carpets leading to the room were very shabby and the paintwork poor The room itself was adequate and clean for the one night we stayed I would not have wanted to stay more than one night but as we had an early train to catch from the station next door the location was perfect Looks like it needs a revamp and a tidy up

Full_Review: The bar wouldnt serve us any food at 10pm We were send away to look for nearby restaurants to eat a small bite After all day at Diseyland it was a last thing I was hoping to hear but had no other choice but to walk again in search for anything to eat   Very clean and spacious room Super kind service at the reception Excellent location

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The room we were allocated smelt a bit damp when we got it Later in mid evening someone from housekeeping came to look at the plumbing on a complaint from a previous resident We should not have been disturbed like this and should not have been allocated to a room with outstanding work to be done on it   The breakfast was very nice and the staff were helpful and polite Appreciated the baggage storage facility on our final morning there

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: As we entered our room on the first day there was a used towel of the former guest left in the bathroom   Good location friendly and helpful staff

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Nothing everything was excellent and I didn t hear a single train The grumpy woman in the Metro ticket office who wouldn t accept a E50 note when I tried to buy two carnets   The location of this hotel is superb only metres away from the mainline train station Gare de Lyon and the TGV s heading west and south and the Metro Line 1 which is only a couple of stops away from exchange stations which take you anywhere in Paris Both stations can be reached without getting wet during February s drizzle The housekeeping staff are excellent they found my wife s lost earring and kept the room spotless The breakfast buffet has a wide variety of food available and everything I sampled was excellent Across from the station there are two fine restaurants I can t decide which was the better I will definitely stay there again

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Nothing  Everything Perfect kind and quick service Great position to take a train at 6am Well connected to every place in paris with taxy or metro right outside the hotel

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: I was very unhappy happy with the shower and bathroom facilities as we had a privilege room and payed the extra money for that the shower was very disappointing and the the toilet flushed was broken and we had constant trickling from the toilet  The staff were very friendly and helpful and you are situated right next to gare de Lyon station so if your using the metro it s ideal also for the city tour buses there is a stop opposite the hotel which was great

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: While there is a coffee machine in the room and tea bags there is no milk fresh or UHT and the cups are disposable paper cups This area is busy at night so if you are a light sleeper you might want to ask for a room away from the street   This hotel is well located if you are travelling by train from Gare de Nord or want easy access to the Metro Bus The hotel room is comfortable with modern bathroom good shower although the stall is quite narrow toiletries etc The front desk staff are welcoming and helpful The breakfast room is pleasant with a good selection of items 24 hour reception desk is a real plus when arriving late

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Not being able to sleep that s what I don t like It s 1 AM as I m writing this I thought it the room would cool down since I returned at 21 30 and have had the window open There is no way of controlling the temperature in the room The AC is off as its winter and outside the air temp is about 7 degrees C In the room its positively tropical still I can put up with noise coming from the street it a fusion of general road traffic people and train station related noise Cars passing close by and the odd truck backing up People wandering past shouting and general Saturday night drunks shouting If I could stop the hot air blowing into the room I could close the window and stop the noise I can t Though even with the window open its still too hot anyway I ve spent years in the tropics so I m used to the heat I ve just had a cold shower and that s helped The last time I did this was in a hut on an island in the Philippines I just rang the 24 24 service quality the phone in my room directed me to The nice man told me that I was winter and cold outside so of course there s no AC I told him that it wasn t AC i needed really just no forced hot air that I can t stop I asked him if there was anything he could do as I was going to write a review and hopefully inform people who might want to avoid being transported to the tropics He said no nothing I m seriously considering leaving the room and sleeping in the train station next door with the homeless people I probably won t because I ve paid for breakfast and may have trouble getting that money back I m sure when temperatures are locally controllable and the windows can be shut this will e okay but so far I can only say okay as without wanting to sound like moaner there are other issues that may bother other people   Location to the train station you ll be practically sleeping on the platform

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The WiFi wasn t brilliant the smart TV wasn t hooked up to the Internet Some staff not so keen to help External doors were locked at night and had to be opened by staff inside the building if you could find them in the rain this wasn t nice   Location was fantastic Rooms were great and most of the staff were brilliant and helpful

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Rooms small and dated pre payment on credit card was held for over a week Ok for one night but I m sure there are better places fir the money overall disappointed   Handy for the station

Full_Review: My room didn t have enough shampoo body wash for one person to shower which you only learn by being in the shower Uber s repeatedly had a hard time finding the location If coming to paris for a vacation or for leisure this might not be the hotel for you Pick one more centrally located   Staff was friendly

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV

Full_Review: For a 4 star hotel I expected to have the bad basic things like a shower cap Bedroom was too warm no airco only van At the site of booking com is not clear that the parking garage is not part of the hotel And it was expensive one

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: 1 Even though the room was fully prepayed they charged me additional 100 euros at the arrival As it was explained it s in case I use anything additional during my stay and after my departure they will be returned to my bank account Be careful it s 50 euros for person for every night of your stay As of now it s been nearly three weeks and money still not returned to my bank account Personally I am never again staying in another Mercury hotel because of this policy and I honestly am scared to think what can happen if for example additional 500 euros are blocked on my card for more than three weeks you can be left without any money during your trip if you are on budget 2 The staff was very unhelpfull as money was blocked on the card without any normal explanation and even though I was talking before my stay via e mail with the hotel s reception aka do I need to pay anything else the asnwer was only breakfasts if you want them nowhere not on the booking com not on the hotel s website not anywhere is mentioned that they are blocking additional 50 euros for each person for every night of your stay Conclusion if you are a guest from out of France and on a budget trip do not stay here There are other hotels near this train station without any guarantee blockings It s more expensive than you think   1 It s just few steps away from Gare de Lyon very comfy if you need to get on the train 2 Room very small classical France but comfy and quiet 3 A bit too expensive but wonderful breakfasts

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Breakfast is overpriced Food selection lunch dinner is very limited and rather fast food type The hotel could be renovated visibly old items in the room   Location is perfect Staff helpful and friendly

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Probably not somewhere we would spend Abu considerable about of time in clean enough for somewhere to sleep shower for one night Can t comment on the staff food as we didn t come across any doe to the time we arrived at night Place sorta looked like a high rise veryong corridors not particularly well decorated   Place was clean Ok if you re just wanting a clean place to crash for the night We were only staying for one night and catching an early train from Paris Gare du Lyon the next morning The station was literally next door so was great location and perfect for what we needed

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Nothing  The position right on the top of Gare de Lyon where we had to take a train at 6am to go back to Italy is amazing With no effort we were on the train In addition the service at the arrival and after is of high level for example I asked for an early check in and I obtained it Every place of the city is easily reachable through a taxy or the subway right under the hotel

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The prices in the bar were quite outrageous needless to say we only had 1 drink there   The location was perfect for us as we were catching a train next morning

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Just a little short staffed on reception  Comfortable bed well equipped room and bathroom facilities which was spotlessly clean Slippers and Dressing gowns supplied Excellent

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Cardboard takeaway cups and plastic cups for tea coffee is not what you would expect although it does cut down on their cleaning costs Not sure what the criteria is for room allocation but being friendly trying to carry out the conversation in French as best I could I m sure the hotel was far from full but we seemed to be in a room that felt it hadn t been used for months very moldy odour Poor quality pillows  Location Close to Gar de Lyon station Good cafe and restaurants opposite station

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Bedroom is on the small side compared with Mercure outside Paris   Proximity to the station could not be closer Excellent breakfast Great choice of restaurants nearby

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The room was very small as was the bath We thought the price of breakfast excessive and diet not partake We will not stay again or recommend to anyone  Proximity to Gare de Lyon

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The lack of the advertised coffee maker in the room and the niggardly supply of coffee and tea sachets Paper cups are intolerable in a hotel of its supposed standard The cost of the breakfast which we chose not to have for that reason The staff were somewhat less than friendly and welcoming The fridge in the room smelt and was absurdly small   The location s convenience for catching our train

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Nothing   Perfect location right infront of the train station and a short walk from Notre Dame Plenty of bars and restaurants in easy walking distance Room comfy and clean would happily have stayed more than one night

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: There were no negative points to our accomodation   Convenience of Gare De Lyon Station The Hotel was very good but our visit was very short because of our Train timetable We would stay again and enjoy the other facilities which were comprehensive particularly the Restaurant

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: A couple minor fixes needed to the basic facilities Besides this really nothing   Right next door to the train station so it was perfect for our one night accommodation before transit to Rome About a 30minute walk along the water to some nice parks and the Bercy village

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Felt very insecure There was NO security in the hotel reception and anyone could have used the lifts up to the rooms Room was very small indeed Window to shower was quite unnecessary   Convenient location if travelling into or from Gare de Lyon Charming receptionist who put us in a privileged room

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The breakfast staff need to be retrained in manners as very rude and very unhelpful The desk staff especially a young man at the desk was very polite As it was a special occasion I was upgraded to a lovely room for free

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: I paid for an upgrade room with bar fridge and coffee tea facility Bar fridge had ONE soft drink and ONE bottle flat water in Small paper cups for coffee Just TWO Nespresso machine capsules NOT in line with the pictures on the brochure large ceramic mugs etc   staff friendly and professional even smiled at my French Late check out allowed

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The rooms were clean but very basic for a 4 star hotel little things like no shower cap in the bathroom   The hotel was in a perfect situation for an overnight stay and travelling from the Gare de Lyon the following morning Quick and easy as no check out bill receipt emailed on after departure

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: We asked for a quiet room in the booking They gave us one on the street side very noisy Even more irritating was the poor air conditioning In the middle of our second night it failed completely We had to pack everything and move to another room at 1AM The desk offered no help in the move At least there was another room available where the AC worked

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The air conditioning was working but it failed to cool the room and there was no air circulation making it very stuffy and humid   The privilege room had complimentary soft drinks in the fridge These were very welcome

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Very pleasant check in staff but overall feel of the hotel was impersonal   Good location for train journey early next morning and for dinner at Le Train Bleu Short walk to the river

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: only one free bottle of water and two very small milk pods for coffee tea But housekeeping were happy to deliver more to our room   It was the nearest hotel to the train station

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Nothing   Position next to railway station Near Gare du Bercy after dropping our car off for the auto train and next morning catching train to Narbonne Near restaurants and bars Breakfast good hot and cold

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: My friend I each paid half of the tariff on check out I have now discovered that the hotel has taken a security amount from my credit card recorded on booking com and a second amount from my card when checking in the same card used to pay the account I now have to try to recover these two charges from the hotel I see that I am not the only customer to have been charge twice

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Rooms are small but well appointed   Fantastic location next to the train station and so close to shops restaurants and the high line The staff were incredibly patient and helpful

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Didn t like the position because of the close proximity to the railway station and it brought about many people who were just hanging about drunk Not a good area

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: This hotel is grossly overpriced In future I will look further afield i e The Holiday inn only 250 m from station   The location cannot be bettered to catch an early morning train The room was better than I had last year The staff were efficient

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Not much milk in rooms for tea coffee  Close to station Breakfast good choice We paid about 90 per room for twin rooms which was reasonable price other nights the advertised price was much higher and this would have not been particularly good value

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The hotel did not feel secure and comfortable for the price I paid The room was a bit dark The hairdryer attached to the wall exploded there was a flame I called reception and it took some time for another hairdryer to be brought to my room I was shaken up after this experience yet the apology and managing of this situation was poor   The location was good because I had to take a train from Gare de Lyon

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Small room small window reasonable comfortable   Location next to station walking distance to rest and city attraction if you willing to exercise is quiet ok

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Smokers allowed to smoke by entrance Very European in this respect though   Very quiet and clean Next to the train station with buses out side as well Some nice food places close by

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Well for a hotel in France a few more choices on the wine list would be nice But not a deal breaker Otherwise it s good to go   The location at Gare de Lyon is the best You are right there at the train station if you need to take an early train because you come in late from the airport or whatever The rooms are great and the little bar offers nice light meals

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Bad staff at check in talking and greeting others and chatting to them whilst booking us in Answering the phone three times whilst booking us in no apologies very rude service   Clean

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Since it is right next to the train station there is a bit of noise from announcements according to my husband I didn t notice it while I was sleeping   What a pleasant surprise that a hotel next to a major train station is so affordable and pleasant The rooms are small but well planned Ours had a little minibar stocked with included beverages The staff spoke English well and were super helpful

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Aircon did not stay as cool as we would have liked but window opened to let in cool night air   A good location next to Gare Du Lyon Easy walk to the Seine and other areas Plenty of cafes to choose from Room pleasant though rather small Bed large and comfy

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Garderobe is small for 2 persons when staying 3 5 days But is not bad though  Room was clean Enough towels in the Room Good water supply in shower and toilet Got the LUCK in Privilege Room Just a few steps to Gare de Lyon if traveling by train A good place to stay Comfortable So generous with Soap Lotion and others Refill Bathroom is spacious Highly Recommendable and I will surely come back with friends and Family Friendly Personnel Thank you

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Though booking made through your agency and payment was taken in advance of our arrival the hotel made an unusual step of demanding a further guarantee of 100 to cover any other services such as breakfast We declined breakfast as it was quite expensive at 17 per person   The room was large and comfortable and we had spent there 3 days in all in Paris to contact friends before going to Annecy

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: I had trouble finding the hotel on arrival on the metro I asked for milk and it never arrived I asked for a wake up call and didn t receive one  Close to station for train to Provence early the next morning

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Please supply china cups for coffee and tea paper cups are a no no   Friendly staff breakfast good selection available Location excellent for travelers on TGV and Metro

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: It was all good I was only there a short time late arrival and early departure so didn t try the breakfast or anything but it seemed to run well   It is at Gare de Lyon and when you have an early train it just doesn t get any better The room was very comfortable and quiet given the location The staff very friendly and helpful I got in late but was still able to get a nice bar meal in the lounge bar Although next to Gare de Lyon there are lots of places to eat near by But when you re on your own and it s late its great to just eat at the hotel And not expensive

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Ideally located for a late arrival into the Gare de Lyon especially on those days when SNCF services are disrupted by strikes We have previously found this hotel very overheated on this visit it felt much more comfortable Chance or change

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The closeness to the station on arrival but the rooms are so well soundproofed that it didn t seem like it was so close to a railway Very good breakfast including hot cooked food A very comfortable peaceful night

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: the room was very small so storing luggage was a bit difficult   The evening before our checkout we ate at Le Train Bleu next to the hotel and the meal was wonderful The breakfast at the hotel and its location were as we needed

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The decor in areas we saw needs upgrading It s a bit shabby   Beds were comfy it s a great central location The staff were friendly and welcoming

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: I really liked the idea of the coffee machine Nescafe but the paper cups and lack of milk were disappointing  Very conveniently located for the Gare de Lyon station virtually alongside the station so there is no problem with luggage transfer We didn t try the hotel breakfast as there are so many typical French cafe s just across the street The room was very adequate and comfortable for an overnight stay

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The rooms should at least have hotel slippers for visitors in the room  The breakfast was superb and the hotel was generally clean and most important is the strategic location which allowed ease of commuting

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Mattress was too hard  Excellent location ideal for metro trains bus and coach transport restaurants bars and cafes Close to the Seine Room was a good size for a Paris hotel The staff were welcoming polite and helpful

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: It s an impersonal hotel with very little to commend it except location Not cheap small austere rooms and evening reception staff inhospitable Morning receptionist was friendlier No other staff available in public areas to direct us to breakfast room which was poorly signposted and difficult to find at the end of a long grey corridor and when we got there a dreary lifeless space to eat Breakfast was a completely self service affair even though there were numerous staff on duty and the coffee was dire   good location for Gare de Lyon

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Scrambled eggs at breakfast too sticky  Front desk staff very helpful guest internet PC very useful in room safe very clean comfortable excellent location to trains buses spacious bathroom good choices of breakfast teas

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Our room was at the smoker floor and we are not smokers at all When I told that to the reception the guy told me yes normal because you did not mention in your booking reservation that you are not a smoker I find this simply amazing and I was completely not aware that this kind of practice reserving an entire floor for the smokers was still existing especially in Paris The service and the rooms are clearly not at the level of a 4 especially considering the price we pay 200 for 2 with the breakfast which was just ok   The only good point is the proximity with the train station really practical

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: They should pay more attention to hygiene cleanliness of the rooms especially bathroom The bed was extremely uncomfortable I could feel and hear the springs in the bed Very depressing atmosphere

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: As it was a joint birthday celebration stayed at the Mecure instead of the nearby Ibis and upgraded to the Priveledge room at the Mecure We had paper cups in the room only one each no spares Why no extra cups We re we supposed to wash the paper cups We asked for decaf coffee and extra cups at Reception and left a note in the room it didn t happen Small details but we d paid for a 4 star hotel and didn t expect to drink out of cardboard cups  Location excellent

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: I love how the front reception welcoming us with smile and arrange immediately our room when we arrive in the middle of the night by train Its such a pleasure staying at the hotel

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Everything this hotel should not be ranked as a 4star in the uk this wouldn t be ranked more than a 2 The bedrooms stank of smoke or chemicals covering up smoke We changed rooms 3 times before we could bare the smell level The beds were tiny The staff rude and unhelpful   The close proximity of the station but that is the only good thing

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: None   The front desk staff really helpful especially when i am having trouble connecting internet on my SFR simcard phone they tried as much as they can to really help me and i really appreciate with all their effort as for the room its nice though its abit small spaces and small toilet but its just perfect for me my husband since we only need it to stay one night so we can catch up our early train to Italy the next morning overall i must say i have no negative comments about them All excellent

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Rooms are small but is fine for short stay  Very close and convenient to Gare de Lyon if TGV metro travelling and carrying luggage Close to restaurants and shops Staff very helpful and friendly

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The hotel s location is very nice the receptionists are very welcoming and very helpful to any problem or question To the Privilege type of room in which the minibar and cofee expresor were free were nice we had our tea and cofee in every morning in our room Everyone should know that for the room a 300 euro deposit will be blocked from your account during the stay amount which will be unlocked at the time of your check out but depending on the country where you are from or the bank that you are working with the unlocking of this amount can take up to 3 weeks this is a normal banking procedure

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Limited menu would have liked a good restaurant   Friendly helpful staff Good atmosphere Room was comfortable and clean and convenient for the railway station

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Great location having arrived late in Paris by TGV from Marseilles Friendly helpful welcoming staff With only one full day in Paris we used one of the open tour buses that stops across the street and saw as many sights as we could possibly fit in Fantastic

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Wasn t told until we arrived that they was to take 50 per person per night deposit for breakfast room service and damages even though we told them we didn t want breakfast or room Service  Location excellent right next to a main train station

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The total inflexibility after some genuine error made over a date of stay Resulting in being charged 2 3 more of original price A total disgrace I intend seeking legal advice   Leaving

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: I chose a superior room and I didn t feel there was much value for money There was an espresso machine which was nice but there were still paper cups I think for 165 they could provide real cups Wifi was slow Ask for a room not overlooking the platform otherwise it ll be noisy but if it s the other side then the room is very quiet   Convenient location as I arrived into gare de lyon quite late Beds were comfortable in the room and had a nice comfortable duvet Bathroom was clean with a great walk in shower Rooms were clean and modern Staff were efficient

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Having received confirmation from Booking com that I had booked a Twin Room I discovered on arrival that the room we were allocated was made up as a Double When I asked for the beds to be split I was told we would have to move to another room this I did but I had to move my own bags despite by then being close to being late for a theatre matinee At no time was an apology offered for the nuisance and waste of time of this error or carelessness all I got was a bland multi purpose smile by the staff on reception   The relative inexpensiveness location functional room bathroom

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Heating ventilation system appears quite ineffective after several stays we have never found the building anything but overheated Bedding too heavy for the ambient temperature   Excellent location for rail travellers arriving late evening or with an early start Check in friendly and efficient Room well equipped

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The breakfast was high cost but poor i e come to Paris to get supermarket croissant Lot of noise until mid night and from 6am due to train station Maid knocking at the door and not waiting for an answer twice we found a maid in our room Overall personnel not very nice We enjoyed several stays there but this time with found it low cost for an increase in cost   This time not much

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The very poor catering facilities in a hotel of this size and the complete lack of service and couldn t care less from the evening catering staff   The location is perfect The reception staff went out of their way to be helpful and welcoming

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Staff are excellent very welcoming attentive and multilingual which is always helpful for people travelling from across Europe The hotel is clean tidy and the cleaning staff are very efficient Great selection at breakfast with fresh food being brought out promptly Even though centrally located surprisingly not that loud we stayed on 5th floor

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Room too small and a bit stuffy Not worth of what I paid   Right next to Gare de Lyon Good for one night stay in order to catch an early morning train next day

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Great location by the gare de Lyon a stroll away from La Bastille The room was rather large for Paris Very quiet room All you expect from the Mercure brand Great breakfast

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: No dislikes  Superior room was excellent Valerio on reception was efficient friendly and requires special mention hotel was perfectly situated for station and breakfast was superb

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Air conditioning not responsive whole hotel too warm for our comfort   Excellent location for rail travellers Staff on reception polite and helpful Room a decent size and well equipped

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Good location We were going to a concert at Bercy Arena only took about 10 mins to walk there Easy to get trains as next door to the station Plenty of places to eat nearby

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Due to the unseasonably warm weather the room was hot but the air conditioning in Room 728 was out of order It was too noisy to keep the window open due to the noise of the trains in the station below Wi fi was very unstable even though I paid 9 euros for the premium wifi   Location of this hotel was excellent being adjacent to the Gare de Lyon and one stop on the metro from the Bercy sorry AccorHotels Arena for the BNP Paribas Masters Tennis Room was comfortable nothing more I didn t have breakfast in the hotel so cannot comment on that Was able to leave my suitcase in a secure room on departure day until it was time to take my train Staff on the front desk were all polite and helpful

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Room was a bit small but still comfortable for one person Other than that nothing  I really loved the breakfast Catered more to my taste but they had traditional French breakfast as well staff was very helpful as well The location is awesome too literally attached to the train station so it s easy to find if you go to gare de lyon

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Cleanliness Personell availability Queue at check in Really not diverse breakfast No minibar products even though the hotel blocked money on my credit card   Good location near the trains station unfortunately this is the single asset

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The rooms are too small Its basically a 3 star motel Initially when we arrived we were informed of the non availabilty of double beds inspite of the fact that we SPECIFICALLY booked for double beds on the upper floors ahead of time Imagine sleeping with a friend in a small bed after 6 hours of travelling on the train we begged of course and they relented afterwards The bedframes were moving and we had a view of a ledge littered with cigarette butts of the first floor roof The hallway smells musty Breakfast of 70 euros is not worth it Better take your breakfast someplace else   It s close proximity to the Gard De Lyon Station The fact that they close the main doors of the hotel after midnight The area of Gard De Lyon at midnight is full of arab and african migrants and some are really creepy or very furtive so this extra security measure is a plus 98 of the staff are very friendly

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: We have utilized Mercure and their services within various countries Our experience of this booking is that the tiny tiny size of the room was 1 that we could not recommend to anyone We would not stay again due to the room size and constant announcements from the train station Was a privilege room on the 6th floor   Staff and how they interacted was commendable

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: I didn t like that it was quit expensive for the dimension of the room and for not including breakfast in this amount of money Also quit expensive breakfast in case you wanted to taste it   I liked a lot the staff and its location

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The beds were the most uncomfortable ever worse than many cheaper hotels This needs to change and purchasing higher quality mattresses   Location perfect next to Gare de Lyon

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Room small for a superior rating Long wait at reception reception staff also answer phone calls Damage to shower controls and window latch  Handy for Gare de Lyon Helpful barman

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The reception staff were rude Our key cards did not seem to be working so we asked for help We were given another set and a patronising teach in on how to use them When these did not seem to work we asked the concierge who finally informed us that we should have been told that the door handle had to be pulled up not down due to safety reasons The reception staff had forgotten to tell us this   The concierge The only helpful member of staff in the hotel

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Was superb if room space be slightly bigger   Location comfort and other facilities were superb We stayed 4 nights with children in privilege room and we do recommend for family Happy stay

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The bedroom was very small in fact the smallest we have stayed in for a long time There were paper cups for coffee and a very basic bathroom even though this was said to be a Superior Room Strangely there was a huge flat screen TV and a Nespresso machine for coffee but we didn t use either of them There were insufficient staff at breakfast so tables were not cleared very fast and items on the breakfast bar not replaced quickly   The hotel was very convenient for our late arrival at the Gare de Lyon The staff were professional and friendly

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Ordinary facility Room very small and ac not responsive to adjustments   Great location right next to train station staff couldn t have been more helpful

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Many thing I did not like among them the following 1 They charged me 100 euro per day as a guarantee though the hotel policy as shown in Booking com says nothing about that the reception lady insisted to charge this ridicules amount 2 the hotel did not pay attention to our special request and we had to wait for more than 2 hrs to get our room the reception lady was so rude and informed us that the check in time is at 14 00 and not 12 00 as stated in Booking com she blamed Booking com for the inaccurate information 3 upon our arrival to the room we were shocked by the miserable doubled bed we got two single beds closed to each other with out any joint when you sleep on this doubled bed it is very likely to fall down in the middle of the gab which would be created and 4 the stuff has no respect to the guest privacy our room was crashed twice by the hotel stuff while we were resting there with out our permission The hotel does not look like a 4 stars hotel it lacked any facility of which qualifies this property to be ranked as a 4 stars hotel They have no porter   Near to the train station and metro They gave us a free late check out until 16 00 pm and store our luggages for free as well

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The two cards given to access room never worked A member of staff had to let us in Then the receptionist came up and said they d fix it It didn t work at all Each time we left room had to get assistance It became a bit of a nuisance that s all especially as we were on 5th floor   Ideal location Walked from Gare du Bercy after dropping our car off for the auto train to Narbonne to Gare du Lyon and the hotel So next morning after breakfast we were ready to catch our train down south as hotel is right on top of the station Plenty of nearby bars and restaurants nearby for the evening too

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: Some of the corridors smelt a bit but it was hot so that might happen anywhere in Paris  Breakfast buffet was good Some unusual options like American pancakes with bacon and maple syrup The staff were really friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: There were quite few hairs from previous customers in the bathroom when checked in A broken chair with nail sticking out was in the room upside down without any notes It would be nice to have a replacement chair then   The location was great at the middle of medieval village Our room was in the separate building from the reception but the room was huge Good security

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The room was small but we had expected that from other reviews The air conditioning was not working while we were there which was particularly unpleasant on one night when it was quite hot It was being fixed but was still to be rectified when we left we were there for 3 days No information on the problem was offered by staff   We were catching a train from Gare de Lyon so the location was excellent It was great having a big brand pod coffee maker in the room

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: AirCon totally ineffective on night of stay weather exceptionally hot humid Uncomfortable sweaty night No restaurant on premises Local eateries not particularly good   Location convenient for onward travel

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: No hotel restaurant for evening meals Some local restaurants are a bit rough General area around Gare de Lyon dirty noisy  Very helpful staff Location good for onward travel

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: The room or if Im not mistaken all the standard double rooms are cramped in size barely enough for two humans to walk through Woth the third peace of luggage be prepared to rhink of innovative ideas to use the room either to get rid of tables and chairs or to jump accross points of interest inside the room  The wifi speed was very good compared to other hotels

Hotel_Name: Mercure Paris Gare De Lyon TGV
Full_Review: this is paris but this hotel is overpriced the room was very small the aircondition didn t work and there was a strange kind of smell in the room no catastrophe but i would expect more for the money  wifi

Full_Review: The airco did not seem to work well so opened windows instead The wireless did not work at all for me   A small hotel but nicely located near many bars and restaurants It s a 15 minute pretty straight forward walk to the Eiffel Tower The room was great Nice comfortable bed with big TV screen Windows can be openend to look into the streets When closed it s a quiet area even as my room was located on a corner overlooking a few restaurants The light system works with a button panel next to the bed which you need to play around with a bit One of them incl a buzzer to open the door Not unsafe just makes an expected noise if you try to switch off the lights The toilet is separated from the bathroom which is nice if you travel in pairs The shower was nice clean and spacious I would be better to fix it higher than 1 80 meter for people taller than this There is space enough so not sure why they fixed it like this Can highly recommend this hotel for a weekend or longer if you need to be in Paris Centre
